footer.tagline: A fictional alliance for better shark-human relations. 50% of every sale funds real ocean conservation.

hero.badge: 50% of every sale funds real ocean conservation
hero.description: The perfect gag gift for anyone who's ever side-eyed the ocean. Buy a funny certificate — half goes to real shark conservation. The other half keeps one very tired human running this project.
hero.subtext: The #1 gift for people who are afraid of sharks. Also the #1 way to symbolically not get eaten.
hero.giftBadge: 🎁 The perfect gag gift for shark-fearers
hero.finnleyDesc: Press spokesperson. Optimistic. Slightly offended by Hollywood.
hero.lunaDesc: Dept. of Misunderstanding Prevention. Judges your wetsuit color.
hero.imageAlt: Finnley Mako and Luna Reef — the Alliance ambassadors

realImpact.label: Real Impact
realImpact.title: Funny certificate. Real conservation.
realImpact.description: Every certificate sold directly funds real ocean and shark conservation. The joke is fictional. The impact is not.
realImpact.forSharksText: Half of every sale goes directly to verified ocean and shark conservation organizations. No middlemen, no vague promises, no "administrative fees" that mysteriously eat the budget like a tiger shark eating a surfboard.
realImpact.forHumanTitle: 50% — For the human who built this
realImpact.forHumanText: The other half keeps the servers running and the Alliance founder fed. Because while sharks eat fish, humans unfortunately require rent, coffee, and the occasional non-symbolic meal. Think of it as funding the Alliance's land-based operations department (staff: one very tired person).

howItWorks.label: How it works
howItWorks.title: Fast, symbolic and surprisingly impactful.
howItWorks.description: Three steps: pick a certificate, fund real conservation, and enjoy a measurable improvement in diplomatic shark vibes.
howItWorks.step1Text: Choose from three levels of symbolic shark diplomacy — each one funnier and more official-looking than the last.
howItWorks.step2Text: 50% of your purchase is donated to verified shark and ocean conservation organizations. The impact is real.
howItWorks.step3Text: Get a personalized certificate, feel symbolically safer around sharks, and know you actually helped protect them.

about.label: About the alliance
about.title: A fictional world with a very real mission.
about.p1: Shark Human Alliance is a playful fictional universe where sharks actively work on their public image, issue diplomatic statements, and advocate for better relations with humans.
about.p2: The tone is humorous, but the mission is dead serious: turn fear into curiosity, fund real conservation, and make sharks feel less like monsters and more like misunderstood ocean neighbors with a branding problem.
about.certText: is officially recognized by the Shark Human Alliance as a supporter of peaceful shark-human relations and a contributor to real ocean conservation.

membershipSection.label: Membership options
membershipSection.title: Choose your level of shark diplomacy.
membershipSection.description: Every tier includes a personalized certificate, symbolic alliance status, and a real donation to shark conservation.
membershipSection.basicDescription: A clean entry point into the alliance. Digital certificate, symbolic status, and $4.50 donated to ocean conservation.
membershipSection.protectedDescription: The flagship tier — polished, giftable, and $9.50 goes directly to protecting sharks and their habitat.
membershipSection.nonsnackDescription: Peak symbolic prestige for humans who refuse to be considered menu-adjacent. $14.50 donated to conservation.

transparency.transparencyTitle: We publish where the money goes.
transparency.transparencyText: Quarterly reports showing exactly how much was donated and to which organizations. If a shark could read a spreadsheet, they would approve.
transparency.legalText: The Shark Human Alliance is a fictional entertainment brand. Conservation donations are real and verifiable. Your certificate does not protect you from actual sharks. It does, however, help protect actual sharks from us.

items.question: Is the alliance real?
items.answer: The alliance is fictional and intentionally humorous. The conservation donations are real and verifiable.

items.question: Does membership protect me from sharks?
items.answer: No. Your certificate provides zero marine protection. It does, however, help protect actual sharks from us.

items.question: Where does the money actually go?
items.answer: 50% goes directly to verified ocean and shark conservation organizations. 50% keeps the Alliance running — servers, design, coffee, and one very tired human.

items.question: Why sharks?
items.answer: Humans kill roughly 100 million sharks per year. Sharks kill about 5 humans. They need better PR, and they need real help. We do both.

items.question: Will I receive a certificate?
items.answer: Yes. A personalized digital certificate with your name, membership tier, and an air of surprisingly official diplomatic recognition.

items.question: Can I give this as a gift?
items.answer: Absolutely. Protected Friend Status is the most popular gift option — funny enough to share, polished enough to frame.

membershipPage.title: Choose your shark diplomacy level.
membershipPage.description: Every membership tier is fictional, humorous, and designed to feel oddly official. The goal is simple: better shark-human vibes, better gifts, and dramatically improved symbolic relations.
membershipPage.whatBuyingText: Not actual protection. Not insurance. Not marine enforcement. They are buying a humorous symbolic status inside the Shark Human Alliance world.
membershipPage.whyWorksText: It functions as a funny gift, a shareable certificate, and the core monetization entry point for the whole brand.
membershipPage.toneText: The product copy must always make clear that this is playful, fictional and symbolic — while still feeling polished and gift-worthy.
membershipPage.tiersTitle: Three ways to become more acceptable to sharks.
membershipPage.tiersDescription: Start simple, choose the strongest giftable tier, or go fully into symbolic prestige.
membershipPage.basicDescription: A clean entry point into the alliance for kind-hearted humans with reasonable diplomatic ambitions.
membershipPage.protectedDescription: The strongest core offer: a humorous, polished and giftable symbolic status inside the alliance.
membershipPage.nonsnackDescription: A more absurd prestige tier for humans who would strongly prefer not to be considered menu-adjacent.
membershipPage.businessDescription: For surf schools, dive centers, beach bars, and any venue that wants to declare itself officially recognized by sharks. Display the certificate proudly. Sharks love good interior design.
membershipPage.businessCertText: has been officially designated as a Shark-Approved Zone by the Shark Human Alliance
membershipPage.step1Text: Choose the version that best matches the gift, joke intensity, and symbolic prestige you want.
membershipPage.step2Text: Add the recipient name and optional dedication so the membership feels like a real gift, not just a joke.
membershipPage.step3Text: The recipient receives an official-looking alliance document and a major boost in shark diplomacy aesthetics.
membershipPage.clarificationTitle: This is a fictional symbolic product.
membershipPage.clarificationText: Membership in the Shark Human Alliance does not provide legal, physical, spiritual, maritime, biological, emotional, or anti-bite protection. It is a humorous product concept designed for gifts, certificates and brand storytelling.

faqItems.question: Is this a real protective product?
faqItems.answer: No. All memberships are fictional, symbolic, and intended as humorous gifts or fan-style participation in the Shark Human Alliance universe.

faqItems.question: Will I receive something after payment later on?
faqItems.answer: Yes. The intended product flow is a personalized digital certificate and related alliance recognition assets.

faqItems.question: Why does the page talk about protection if it is fictional?
faqItems.answer: Because the humor of the project is built around symbolic shark diplomacy. The joke works only if it remains clearly playful and obviously non-literal.

faqItems.question: Which option should be the main product?
faqItems.answer: Protected Friend Status is probably the strongest main offer. It is clearer and more giftable than Basic Membership, while still slightly more elegant than Non-Snack Recognition.

membershipPage.joinText: It is the best flagship offer: funny, polished, easy to understand, and ideal for certificate-based gifting.

protectedPage.title: Protected Friend Status
protectedPage.description: A symbolic recognition tier for humans who deserve a slightly warmer reception from sharks and a significantly more official-looking certificate.
protectedPage.recommended: Recommended as the core launch product for Shark Human Alliance.
protectedPage.bestUseText: This is the best tier for gifting, brand clarity and certificate-led monetization.
protectedPage.whyTitle: Funny enough to be shareable. Clean enough to feel premium.
protectedPage.whyDescription: Protected Friend Status sits exactly where the concept works best: clearly humorous, clearly fictional, but still polished enough to feel like a real gift product rather than a throwaway joke.
protectedPage.reason1Text: The name is funny, but still readable and gift-worthy.
protectedPage.reason2Text: It naturally supports a personalized certificate and recognition badge.
protectedPage.reason3Text: If only one paid product exists at launch, it should probably be this one.
protectedPage.buyTitle: Next step: connect this page to checkout.
protectedPage.buyText: For now this is a polished product detail page. The next build step will be adding a purchase button, then checkout, then certificate personalization.

faqItems.question: Is this actual protection from sharks?
faqItems.answer: No. Protected Friend Status is a fictional symbolic product and does not provide real-world protection of any kind.

faqItems.question: Why is this the main product?
faqItems.answer: Because it is the clearest balance between funny, polished and giftable. It is more distinctive than Basic Membership and cleaner than the more absurd Non-Snack tier.

faqItems.question: What should happen after purchase later on?
faqItems.answer: The intended flow is checkout, certificate personalization, confirmation, and digital delivery of the certificate.

purchase.title: Secure your diplomatic status.
purchase.subtitle: One form. One payment. One step closer to not being a snack.
purchase.nameLabel: Full name of the future diplomat
purchase.giftToggle: This is a gift for someone
purchase.dedicationPlaceholder: e.g. For surviving every beach vacation since 1987
purchase.paymentPlaceholder: Payment gateway will be connected here. For now, click below to simulate a completed purchase.
purchase.successText: Your symbolic status has been registered. The sharks have been notified (symbolically).
purchase.viewRegistry: See yourself in the Diplomatic Registry

registry.title: The Diplomatic Registry
registry.subtitle: An official-ish record of every human who has achieved symbolic recognition from sharks.
registry.description: Listed below are all recognized diplomats of the Shark Human Alliance. Sorted by date of diplomatic achievement. No sharks were consulted in the creation of this list.
registry.emptyState: No diplomats found. The sharks are still waiting.
registry.disclaimerText: This registry provides no legal, marine, or nutritional status. Inclusion does not reduce your statistical likelihood of being a shark's lunch. It does, however, make you part of a very exclusive list of people who paid money to be told they are not food.

certificate.subtitle: Office of Interspecies Diplomatic Affairs
certificate.statusLabel: has been granted the status of
certificate.body: and is hereby recognized by the Shark Human Alliance as a contributor to peaceful shark-human relations, a supporter of real ocean conservation, and a human whose name has been formally recorded in the Diplomatic Registry.
certificate.businessBody: and is hereby designated by the Shark Human Alliance as a Shark-Approved Zone, signifying that this establishment has met the symbolic standards of interspecies hospitality and is considered a safe diplomatic territory by sharks worldwide (symbolically).
certificate.businessFooter: This certification is entirely symbolic. No actual sharks were consulted, surveyed, or asked for their opinion on your venue's ambiance.
certificate.footer: This certificate is entirely symbolic and provides zero marine protection. The sharks appreciate the gesture.
